message:
✨ Add Umami dual tracking alongside GA4 for 2-week validation (#2196)

Wire Umami analytics (self-hosted at analytics.kubestellar.io) in parallel
with GA4. All 100+ existing events automatically flow to both platforms
via the send() function — no changes needed to individual emit functions.

- Load Umami tracking script (ksc) from analytics.kubestellar.io
- Route events to Umami via umami.track() in send()
- Separate website IDs for production vs localhost
- Update CSP in netlify.toml to allow analytics.kubestellar.io
- Umami failures are silently caught (never affects GA4)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@
     Strict-Transport-Security = "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
     Permissions-Policy = "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()"
     X-XSS-Protection = "1; mode=block"
-    Content-Security-Policy = "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://api.github.com https://api.dicebear.com https://fonts.gstatic.com wss:; frame-ancestors 'none'"
+    Content-Security-Policy = "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://analytics.kubestellar.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://api.github.com https://api.dicebear.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://analytics.kubestellar.io wss:; frame-ancestors 'none'"
 
 [[headers]]
   for = "/assets/*"
